rationale.R1.3: The output identifies three critical problems with the evidence-claim alignment, but does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (problems #2 and #4), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not.
